hero.title: AI-Powered Conversational System for ARGO Float Data
hero.subtitle: Explore, query, and visualize oceanographic information with ease.

background.title: Background
background.description: ARGO floats are autonomous oceanographic instruments that collect vital data about ocean temperature, salinity, and biogeochemical properties. Our AI system makes this data accessible through natural language queries.

realTime.title: Real-time Tracking
realTime.description: Monitor live ARGO float positions and data collection

aiQuery.title: AI-Powered Queries
aiQuery.description: Ask questions in natural language and get instant insights

visualization.title: Advanced Visualization
visualization.description: Interactive charts, maps, and 3D oceanographic profiles

export.title: Data Export
export.description: Export data in multiple formats for further analysis

solution.title: Expected Solution
solution.description: A comprehensive platform that bridges the gap between complex oceanographic data and researchers, providing intuitive access to ARGO float information through conversational AI and advanced visualizations.
